summary: Three buildings assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE and two with MODERATE DAMAGE, all with PROBABLE confidence. The scene depicts an outdoor area with extensive rubble, collapsed structures, and debris fields, with people standing among the wreckage. The likely functional impact is significant degradation of the assessed targets’ operational capability.
